basic_details.job_title: NIT Delhi Senior Project Associate Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.organization_name: National Institute of Technology Delhi (NIT Delhi)
basic_details.short_information: National Institute of Technology Delhi (NIT Delhi) has published the Senior Project Associate Recruitment 2026 notification. The recruitment drive aims to fill 1 Senior Project Associate position. Candidates holding a Doctoral Degree in Science/ Engineering/ Technology/ Pharma/ MD or a relevant Bachelor's/ Master's degree with the prescribed R&D experience are eligible to attend the walk-in interview on 16 July 2026. The official notification PDF and walk-in details are provided below.

qualification.education_qualification: Doctoral Degree in Science/ Engineering/ Technology/ Pharma/ MD from recognized University or equivalent with a minimum of 60% aggregate marks (CGPA ≥ 6.5/10). OR Four-year Bachelor's degree/Master Degree in Natural or Agricultural Sciences/master's degree in engineering or technology from a recognised university or equivalent with minimum 60% aggregate marks (CGPA ≥ 6.5/10) and 2-4 years' experience in R&D in industrial and academic institutions.
qualification.details: Doctoral Degree in Science/ Engineering/ Technology/ Pharma/ MD from recognized University or equivalent with a minimum of 60% aggregate marks (CGPA ≥ 6.5/10). OR Four-year Bachelor's degree/Master Degree in Natural or Agricultural Sciences/master's degree in engineering or technology from a recognised university or equivalent with minimum 60% aggregate marks (CGPA ≥ 6.5/10) and 2-4 years' experience in R&D in industrial and academic institutions.

content_sections.heading: NIT Delhi Senior Project Associate Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the NIT Delhi Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download NIT Delhi Senior Project Associate Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: NIT Delhi Senior Project Associate Vacancy Details 2026
NIT Delhi Senior Project Associate Eligibility Criteria 2026
content_sections.text: Doctoral Degree in Science/ Engineering/ Technology/ Pharma/ MD from recognized University or equivalent with a minimum of 60% aggregate marks (CGPA ≥ 6.5/10). OR Four-year Bachelor's degree/Master Degree in Natural or Agricultural Sciences/master's degree in engineering or technology from a recognised university or equivalent with minimum 60% aggregate marks (CGPA ≥ 6.5/10) and 2-4 years' experience in R&D in industrial and academic institutions.

content_sections.heading: NIT Delhi Senior Project Associate Salary 2026
NIT Delhi Senior Project Associate Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
NIT Delhi Senior Project Associate Selection Process 2026
Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to attend the walk-in interview for NIT Delhi Senior Project Associate Recruitment 2026 should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

content_sections.heading: NIT Delhi Senior Project Associate Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the post offered by NIT Delhi?
faq.answer: NIT Delhi is recruiting for the post of Senior Project Associate. This is a contractual position.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Senior Project Associate post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Senior Project Associate position at NIT Delhi.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is Walk-in Interview. Candidates do not need to apply online beforehand.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Senior Project Associate role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a salary of Rs. 57,000 Per Month plus 30% HRA.

faq.question: Q5. What are the educational qualifications required for the Senior Project Associate post?
faq.answer: Candidates need a Doctoral Degree in Science/Engineering/Technology/Pharma/MD or a four-year Bachelor's/Master's degree in Natural/Agricultural Sciences or Engineering/Technology with relevant experience.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. When is the Walk-in Interview scheduled?
faq.answer: The Walk-in Interview is scheduled to be held on 16 July 2026.

faq.question: Q8. What documents should candidates carry for the Walk-in Interview?
faq.answer: Candidates should carry all original documents, one set of self-attested photocopies, ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates, and category certificates if applicable.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the NIT Delhi located?
faq.answer: National Institute of Technology Delhi is located in Delhi.

faq.question: Q10. What is the official website of NIT Delhi?
faq.answer: The official website of National Institute of Technology Delhi is www.nitdelhi.ac.in.
